titleZh: 在 AI 时代保护注意力：为什么过滤器越好，我们越焦虑？
titleEn: Protecting Attention in the AI Era: The Paradox of Filter Success
seoTitleZh: 如何在 AI 时代保护注意力：信息过载、控制系统与 Filter Success
seoTitleEn: How to Protect Your Attention in the AI Era: Filter Success and Control Systems
excerptZh: 作为初创团队的一员，我一度把高频输入当成勤奋。后来我才发现，那很多时候只是焦虑的另一种形式。问题不在于过滤器失效，而在于过滤器太成功了。人体是一个控制系统，持续的噪声输入只会让系统紊乱。
excerptEn: Working in a startup, I used to treat constant input as discipline. More often it was anxiety in disguise. The problem isn't filter failure; it's filter success. The human body is a control system, and constant noise prevents it from ever reaching stability.
xHookZh: AI 时代最稀缺的，不是信息，而是还能保持形状的注意力。
xHookEn: In the AI era, the scarcest resource is not information. It is attention that can still hold its shape.

titleZh: AI 日报｜Agent Architectures and Edge-Deployable Models Take Center Stage
titleEn: AI Daily | 2026-04-01 | Agent Architectures and Edge-Deployable Models Take Center Stage
excerptZh: Two threads dominate this cycle: a landmark experiment showing self-organizing multi-agent systems outperform rigid role hierarchies, and the maturation of extreme model compression techniques — 1-bit quantization crossing commercial viability and a new open-source framework automating post-training
excerptEn: Two threads dominate this cycle: a landmark experiment showing self-organizing multi-agent systems outperform rigid role hierarchies, and the maturation of extreme model compression techniques — 1-bit quantization crossing commercial viability and a new open-source framework automating post-training quantization pipelines. Meanwhile, DeepSeek-R1's openweights release extends the reasoning model open-source wave, and an npm supply chain compromise affecting Axios reminds the ecosystem that securi

titleZh: TurboQuant、KV Cache 压缩，与开源吸收研究的新速度
titleEn: TurboQuant, KV Cache Compression, and the New Speed of Open Source
excerptZh: TurboQuant 不只是一次漂亮的 KV cache 压缩工作，它也暴露了另一件更重要的事：当一个系统想法被公开，AI 正在把社区把它变成工程实现的时间压缩到按天计算。
excerptEn: TurboQuant is more than a clever KV cache compression result. It also reveals something bigger: once a systems idea is public, AI is shrinking the time it takes for the open-source community to turn it into implementation down to days.
xHookZh: TurboQuant 的重点不只是压缩率，而是 AI 正在把论文变工程的周期压到按天算。
xHookEn: TurboQuant matters not just because of KV cache compression, but because AI is collapsing the gap between a published paper and a working open-source implementation.

titleZh: AI 日报｜2026-03-31：预训练科学化、安全电路的结构性缺陷与 KV 优化突破
titleEn: The Discipline of AI: From Black-Box Scaling to Principled Systems (Mar 31)
excerptZh: 本期两条主线：daVinci-LLM 用 200+ 次消融实验建立预训练科学体系，将数据处理从玄学升级为可证伪的方法论；Squish and Release 揭示安全电路的结构性漏洞——模型知道错误但把它埋进激活空间而非拒绝。四条快讯覆盖 HISA 4 倍速推理、语义记忆的数学证明代价、FormalProofBench 研究生级证明仅 33.5% 准确率、IndexCache 1.82 倍加速。
excerptEn: Two deep dives anchor today's issue: daVinci-LLM's 200+ ablation experiments establishing pretraining as a falsifiable science, and Squish and Release exposing how safety circuits bury rather than reject false premises. Four quick hits cover HISA 4× inference speedup, the mathematical price of semantic memory, FormalProofBench's 33.5% graduate-proof accuracy ceiling, and IndexCache 1.82× acceleration.

titleZh: AI 日报｜政策博弈、安全危机与基础设施竞赛同日登场
titleEn: The Architecture of AI Power
excerptZh: 今天的三条主线分别是：Anthropic 与美国国防部在军事 AI 使用问题上的宪法级冲突；基础设施竞赛升温——Nvidia 宣布 260 亿美元、LeCun 创立 AMI 融资超 10 亿；以及两份报告揭示 AI Agent 的系统性安全漏洞无法靠调参修复。同时，DeepMind 发布 AGI 十维认知框架，中国发布 MERLIN 电子战模型超越 GPT-5。
excerptEn: Three converging dynamics define today's AI landscape: Anthropic's constitutional confrontation with the Pentagon over military AI; a $27B infrastructure race as Nvidia and LeCun's AMI pour resources into open-weight models; and growing evidence that AI agent safety risks are structural, not tunable.

titleZh: AI 日报｜2026-03-27：安全危机、效率突破与推理的几何学
titleEn: LiteLLM Supply Chain Attack & Geometry of Thought (Mar 27)
excerptZh: LiteLLM 供应链攻击 46 分钟内获得 46000+ 次下载，暴露了 AI 工具链的结构性漏洞，引发全生态依赖冷却机制浪潮。与此同时，arRol 在 RLVR 训练中实现 1.7 倍加速，TurboQuant 将 KV cache 压缩 5-7 倍而不损失精度，加上 LLM 离散逻辑推理需要拓扑形变的几何学证明——三条线共同指向一个结论：AI 基础设施的优化正在从粗放走向精细。
excerptEn: LiteLLM's supply chain attack accumulated 46,996 downloads in 46 minutes, exposing structural vulnerabilities across the AI tooling ecosystem and triggering a cross-ecosystem dependency cooldown response. Simultaneously, arRol delivered 1.7× RLVR training speedup, TurboQuant compressed KV cache 5-7× with near-zero quality loss, and a geometric proof showed that LLM discrete logic requires irreducible topological deformation — three converging signals that AI infrastructure optimization is maturing from brute-force to precision.

titleZh: AI日报｜当能力成为负担：安全崩塌、应用爆发与战略收缩
titleEn: When Capabilities Become Liabilities
excerptZh: 本周AI进展揭示关键悖论：前沿模型的能力同时也是潜在漏洞。ISC攻击可达95.3%安全失败率超越越狱，Gemma模型出现情绪崩溃。应用层爆发：Harvey估值110亿美元，豆包日处理100万亿Tokens。基础设施优化和OpenAI关闭Sora标志战略聚焦时代的到来。
excerptEn: This week reveals a critical paradox: the very capabilities that make frontier models powerful are increasingly exposed as vulnerabilities. ISC attack achieves 95.3% safety failure rate surpassing jailbreaks; Gemma shows emotional collapse. Application layer surges: Harvey $11B, Doubao 100T tokens/day. Infrastructure optimization and Sora shutdown mark strategic focus era.

titleZh: AI 的下一个突破，不是更长上下文，而是学会忘掉什么
titleEn: AI's Next Breakthrough: Learning What to Forget
excerptZh: 模型已经很会在一个窗口里分配注意力了。更深的瓶颈是跨时间的记忆管理：什么该写入，什么该保留，什么该衰减，什么该重放。
excerptEn: Context windows keep growing, but the real bottleneck is memory management across time. The next leap in LLMs isn't remembering more — it's knowing what to write, keep, decay, and delete.
xHookZh: AI 的下一个突破，不是更长上下文，而是一套删除策略。
xHookEn: The next AI breakthrough isn't a longer context window. It's a deletion policy.

titleZh: AI笔记与个人CRM深评：为什么你的工具最终吃灰，以及怎么选对
titleEn: Best AI Notes App 2026: Honest Reviews & How to Choose
excerptEn: Notion, Obsidian, Mem, Reflect, Clay — reviewed honestly. Most AI note apps die in week two. Here's the diagnostic framework to pick one that actually sticks.

titleZh: AI日报｜超越Scaling：新边疆的突破与思考
titleEn: Beyond Scaling: The New Frontier
excerptZh: 今天的AI进展从纯规模转向更智能的架构、更安全的工具和更深入的理解。涵盖效率突破GPT-5.4、原生计算机使用、供应链安全危机以及模型心理新研究。
excerptEn: The AI landscape is shifting from pure scale to smarter architectures, safer tools, and deeper understanding. Highlights include efficiency breakthroughs, GPT-5.4 launch, supply chain security crisis, and emerging model psychology research.

titleZh: AI 日报｜AI 在数学、安全和企业领域取得新突破
titleEn: AI Cracks Math, Safety Surprises & DuMate Launch (Mar 24)
excerptZh: 今日 AI 领域出现三个重要转变：前沿数学问题被语言模型攻克，安全研究揭示模型新行为，中国企业 Agent 市场随着百度 DuMate 发布走向成熟。
excerptEn: Today's AI landscape marks three significant shifts: frontier math problems now yield to language models, safety research reveals unexpected model behaviors, and China's enterprise Agent market matures with Baidu's DuMate launch.

titleZh: AI 日报｜安全裂缝与自我进化：LLM系统的两面
titleEn: LLM Safety, Self-Evolution & System Behaviors (Mar 23)
excerptZh: 本周AI领域最值得关注的不是新模型发布的军备竞赛，而是两个深层议题的碰撞：自适应红队攻击揭示LLM安全护栏远比想象中脆弱；Hyperagents展示了AI系统自我改进元层机制的可能性。
excerptEn: This week's AI field presents two colliding narratives: adaptive red-teaming reveals LLM safety guardrails are far more fragile than assumed, while Hyperagents demonstrates AI systems learning to improve their own improvement mechanisms.

titleZh: 架构革命：为什么 AI 扩展没有放缓——而是在重新定向
titleEn: AI Scaling Isn't Slowing — It's Redirecting
excerptZh: 当行业开始重写残差路径、注意力混合方式、长上下文内存机制时，这不是放缓信号；恰恰相反，这是系统层高速进化的信号。
excerptEn: Teams are rewriting residual paths, attention mixing, and memory mechanisms. That's not a sign AI hit a wall — it's proof that system-level evolution is accelerating faster than ever.

titleZh: AI 日报｜本地推理加速；飞书企业 Agent 批量上线

excerptEn: Two tracks this issue: local inference acceleration on consumer hardware, and enterprise agent platforms moving from demos to production deployments.

titleZh: 万物皆能量：从热力学到个人成长的底层法则
titleEn: The Physics of Success: Energy, Order, and Growth
excerptZh: 宇宙的底层法则是熵增，但人类文明是一台逆熵机器——从个人到组织到AI，同一套能量-秩序法则在不同尺度上运行。这不是鸡汤，这是热力学。
excerptEn: The universe defaults toward entropy. You walk against it every day. From thermodynamics to personal growth to AI, the same energy-order law governs every scale — and it's not motivational fluff, it's physics.

titleZh: OpenClaw 为什么会爆：它不是技术奇迹，而是 agent 时代的产物
titleEn: Why OpenClaw Took Off: A Product of the Agent Era
excerptZh: 我对 OpenClaw 的判断，不是它突然比 Claude Code 这类工具多出了一项神秘技术，而是它把主动性、触达、养成和一整套已接近成熟的 agent 基础设施，压成了一个普通人也能直接使用的产品。
excerptEn: OpenClaw didn't invent new AI magic. It compressed initiative, reachability, and habit loops into something ordinary users can live with. That's why it took off — and what it tells us about the agent era.

titleZh: 2026 春节档 AI 大乱斗：Qwen3.5、MiniMax M2.5、GLM-5、Kimi K2.5 深度对比，以及我对 OpenClaw 层级价值的判断
titleEn: Qwen3.5 vs GLM-5 vs Kimi K2.5: Why Agent Orchestration Wins
excerptZh: 四个模型的技术路线各有侧重，但有一个共同方向：把工具调用和 Agent 能力放在比"聪明程度"更优先的位置。这背后，是 OpenClaw 这个层级正在崛起的价值。
excerptEn: Four Chinese AI models dropped in one week — all prioritizing tool-calling over raw intelligence. Here's what each does differently, and why the orchestration layer is the real winner.
